raw_comment:
I notice that there has been a lot of growth over time especially with the fossil fuels.
I wonder why India produces less energy than China 
This relates to me because as climate change takes place we are setting up future generations for failure by leaving them a world full of habitat loss and endangered species.
My headline is “It’s getting hot in here: what energy sources are worse ting climate change?”
